acceptance.label: HTTP routes serve a top-level Prism entrypoint plus stable subroutes for dashboard, plans, and graph without breaking existing `/dashboard` deep links
Existing dashboard bootstrap, summary, operations, and SSE behavior remain available behind the new shell instead of being replaced ad hoc
New shell-serving code stays modular, with dedicated router and asset ownership rather than growing facade files into mixed-purpose logic

payload.summary: Completed the top-level Prism UI shell routing: prism-mcp now serves the shared SPA at `/`, `/dashboard`, `/plans`, and `/graph` through dedicated `ui_router` and `ui_assets` modules, while `/dashboard/api/*` and `/dashboard/events` remain stable dashboard-owned transport. Release build, daemon restart, and live HTTP checks passed.
payload.title: Milestone 1: Generalize dashboard serving into a top-level Prism app shell
